title: Feature boundary reorganization
goal: Reorganize src/ into feature-oriented boundaries. Two-level registration: registerXxxGlobal() + registerXxxWindow(win). hooks.ts becomes composition root. onNotify logic extracted. menus split into thin wrapper + feature menus.
in_scope: Move src/modules/ and src/utils/ into src/features/, src/integrations/zotero/, src/app/, src/shared/
Two-level feature registration: registerXxxGlobal() and/or registerXxxWindow(win): Promise<Disposer>
Extract onNotify business logic into feature-level notifier handlers
Split menus.ts: thin menuManager.ts wrapper + feature-level menu definitions
Move DuplicateItems/mergeItems to src/shared/duplicates/ (shared by duplicates + bulkMerge)
Update all import paths, src/index.ts, typings/global.d.ts (both Addon and ZToolkit paths); consider tsconfig path aliases
Preserve public addon.hooks contract (onStartup, onMainWindowLoad, onMainWindowUnload, onShutdown, onPrefsEvent) for bootstrap.js and preferences.xhtml
acceptance: src/modules/ and src/utils/ directories do not exist
Features use two-level registration (global + window), not single registerXxxFeature(win)
hooks.ts contains no business logic or onNotify handling
integrations/zotero/notifier.ts does not import feature modules directly
menus.ts split: integration wrapper has no business menus
No circular imports between feature directories
Public addon.hooks contract compatible with bootstrap.js and preferences.xhtml
typings/global.d.ts Addon and ZToolkit import paths updated
npm test passes, tsc --noEmit passes, npm run build produces valid XPI
MANUAL: All features work identically to pre-M009 (including preferences panel load)
